guideline: Page route transitions should feel snappy not slow; slide or fade content in from the direction of navigation
reduced_motion_fallback: opacity 0 to 1 only; no translation

guideline: Modal and dialog entry should emerge from trigger element using scale+opacity for spatial continuity
reduced_motion_fallback: opacity fade only; skip scale

guideline: Drawer/sheet slide-in from edge should match the edge it enters from (right drawer slides from right)
reduced_motion_fallback: instant show; no slide

guideline: Color theme switch (light/dark) should crossfade all surfaces to avoid jarring flash
reduced_motion_fallback: instant switch; no crossfade

guideline: Shared-element transitions (Material container transform) morph a card into a detail view preserving bounds
reduced_motion_fallback: cut to detail view; no morph

guideline: Hero/banner parallax on route entry should be subtle; cap translate to under 24px to avoid motion sickness
reduced_motion_fallback: static hero; no parallax

guideline: List-to-detail expansion should grow from the tapped row anchor to keep spatial relationship clear
reduced_motion_fallback: instant detail open; no grow

guideline: Onboarding step transitions should slide horizontally to reinforce linear progress through the flow
reduced_motion_fallback: fade between steps; no slide

guideline: Backdrop/scrim behind modals should fade to its target opacity in parallel with the surface entering
reduced_motion_fallback: instant scrim at full opacity; no fade

guideline: Wizard/stepper back navigation should reverse the entry direction so motion mirrors the user mental model
reduced_motion_fallback: fade only; no directional slide

guideline: Button press feedback (active state) must be immediate and tactile; scale-down to 96% on active
reduced_motion_fallback: background color darken only; no scale

guideline: Form field focus ring should animate in to draw attention; use outline-offset expansion
reduced_motion_fallback: static focus ring; no animation

guideline: Error shake animation on wrong input (login fail) gives physical metaphor for rejection; 3 oscillations max
reduced_motion_fallback: static error state with red border; no shake

guideline: Hover elevation on cards should lift shadow + translate up 2px to signal interactivity on pointer devices
reduced_motion_fallback: color or border highlight only; no lift

guideline: Ripple/state-layer on tap (Material) should radiate from the touch point to confirm the hit target
reduced_motion_fallback: solid pressed background fill; no ripple

guideline: Switch and checkbox toggles should give an immediate snap so the state change reads as committed
reduced_motion_fallback: instant checked state; no snap

guideline: Copy-to-clipboard confirmation should flash a brief check or label swap so the action is acknowledged
reduced_motion_fallback: static Copied label swap; no flash

guideline: Inline validation tick on a valid field should appear gently so it reassures without stealing focus
reduced_motion_fallback: static valid icon; no animation

guideline: Drag handle grab feedback should subtly scale or shadow the item to signal it is now movable
reduced_motion_fallback: cursor change and static shadow only; no scale

guideline: Disabled-action attempt should give a short non-jarring cue (e.g. micro nudge) instead of a full shake
reduced_motion_fallback: static tooltip explaining why disabled; no nudge

guideline: Skeleton screens should pulse with a subtle opacity cycle 0.6 to 1.0; not a spinner for content loading
reduced_motion_fallback: static gray placeholder; no pulse

guideline: Spinner rotation for async actions should be a 360deg continuous loop; expose speed via CSS custom property
reduced_motion_fallback: text Loading shown; no spinner

guideline: Shimmer sweep over skeletons should move in the reading direction at a calm pace to imply progress
reduced_motion_fallback: static placeholder block; no shimmer sweep

guideline: Indeterminate linear progress should sweep edge to edge so users know work is ongoing without a percentage
reduced_motion_fallback: static Loading label; no sweep

guideline: Lazy-loaded image fade-in (blur-up) should resolve from a low-res placeholder to ease perceived load
reduced_motion_fallback: instant swap to final image; no blur-up fade

guideline: Pull-to-refresh spinner should reveal proportionally to drag then loop until the fetch resolves
reduced_motion_fallback: static refresh control; no draw or loop

guideline: Optimistic-UI placeholder for a just-sent item should pulse gently until the server confirms
reduced_motion_fallback: static pending badge; no pulse

guideline: Page-level loading bar (top of viewport) should creep forward then complete fast when the route resolves
reduced_motion_fallback: static top loading label; no creep

guideline: Toggle switch should animate thumb slide + background color in sync; do not animate them independently
reduced_motion_fallback: instant state change; no slide

guideline: Accordion expand/collapse should animate height via max-height or the grid-template-rows trick
reduced_motion_fallback: instant show/hide; no height animation

guideline: Tooltip appear should be delayed ~500ms to prevent flash on cursor travel then fade in
reduced_motion_fallback: static tooltip; no fade; remove delay

guideline: Chip/tag remove animation should scale-out the chip before DOM removal to avoid a layout jump
reduced_motion_fallback: instant removal; no scale-out

guideline: Like/favorite tap should give a small overshoot pop to make the interaction feel rewarding
reduced_motion_fallback: instant filled icon; no pop

guideline: Segmented-control selection should slide an indicator pill to the chosen segment
reduced_motion_fallback: instant active segment highlight; no pill slide

guideline: Dropdown/menu open should fade + scale from the anchor edge so it reads as attached to the trigger
reduced_motion_fallback: instant menu show anchored to trigger; no scale

guideline: Counter/number change should roll or tween between values so users notice the data updated
reduced_motion_fallback: instant number swap; no roll

guideline: Star-rating hover should fill stars progressively to preview the score before commit
reduced_motion_fallback: instant fill on hover; no progressive animation

guideline: Tab switching should slide content horizontally matching the direction of the tab
reduced_motion_fallback: opacity crossfade; no slide

guideline: Floating Action Button should scale up on entry with a slight spring overshoot; scale-down on hide
reduced_motion_fallback: instant appear/hide; no scale

guideline: Scroll-triggered sticky header should transition smoothly from transparent to opaque with shadow
reduced_motion_fallback: instant switch; no transition

guideline: Bottom navigation bar item selection should animate the active icon + label color and a small lift
reduced_motion_fallback: instant active item color change; no lift

guideline: Breadcrumb collapse/expand on small screens should reveal hidden crumbs with a short slide
reduced_motion_fallback: instant expand of hidden crumbs; no slide

guideline: Back-button page exit should animate out in the reverse direction of how the page entered
reduced_motion_fallback: instant page replace; no exit slide

guideline: Mega-menu panel open should fade + drop a few px so the large surface does not appear abruptly
reduced_motion_fallback: instant panel show; no fade or drop

guideline: Swipe-to-dismiss should follow the finger 1:1 then animate to rest or off-screen on release
reduced_motion_fallback: provide a visible Dismiss button; no swipe tracking

guideline: Swipe-to-reveal row actions should rubber-band at the limit so the gesture boundary is felt
reduced_motion_fallback: show persistent action buttons; no swipe reveal

guideline: Pinch-to-zoom should track the gesture live and settle with momentum within min/max bounds
reduced_motion_fallback: provide zoom +/- buttons; no pinch tracking

guideline: Long-press context menu should give a brief grow/haptic cue before the menu surface appears
reduced_motion_fallback: right-click or kebab-menu equivalent; no grow cue

guideline: Drag-and-drop reorder should animate sibling items shifting to make room for the dragged element
reduced_motion_fallback: keyboard move up/down controls; static reorder with no shift

guideline: Carousel swipe should snap to the nearest slide with momentum proportional to flick velocity
reduced_motion_fallback: prev/next arrow buttons; instant slide change with no momentum

guideline: Scroll-reveal entrance for sections should fade + rise content ~16px as it enters the viewport
reduced_motion_fallback: content visible immediately at final position; no reveal

guideline: Scrollytelling/scroll-linked animation should bind progress to scroll position not to a fixed timer
reduced_motion_fallback: show all states stacked statically; no scroll binding

guideline: Scroll-to-top/anchor jumps should smooth-scroll a moderate distance but cut instantly for long pages
reduced_motion_fallback: instant jump to anchor; no smooth scroll

guideline: Sticky-section pinning (scroll-snap) should ease into each snap point so it does not feel mechanical
reduced_motion_fallback: normal free scrolling; no snap easing

guideline: Infinite-scroll appended items should fade in so newly loaded content does not pop jarringly
reduced_motion_fallback: instant render of appended items; no fade

guideline: Scroll progress indicator should update continuously and proportionally to scroll position
reduced_motion_fallback: static or numeric progress; no continuous bar animation

guideline: On-blur field validation should reveal the message with a short slide+fade so it reads as attached
reduced_motion_fallback: instant message show below the field; no slide

guideline: Error summary at submit should scroll to and briefly highlight the first invalid field for focus
reduced_motion_fallback: move keyboard focus to first invalid field; no scroll highlight

guideline: Password-strength meter should tween its fill/color as criteria are met to reward progress
reduced_motion_fallback: static strength label (Weak/Strong); no fill tween

guideline: Success checkmark after submit provides emotional reward and confirms the action completed
reduced_motion_fallback: static success message and checkmark; no draw animation

guideline: Field-level success tick should fade in quietly so valid fields feel resolved without distraction
reduced_motion_fallback: static valid icon; no fade

guideline: Step-validation progress in a multi-step form should animate the completed step indicator filling
reduced_motion_fallback: instant completed-step marker; no fill animation

guideline: Toast/snackbar entry should slide up + fade from the screen edge then auto-dismiss after a timeout
reduced_motion_fallback: instant show of static toast; no slide

guideline: Banner/alert appearance should slide down from the top so the priority message is noticed
reduced_motion_fallback: instant banner show; no slide

guideline: Notification-badge count change should give a small pop so the user notices the new count
reduced_motion_fallback: instant badge count update; no pop

guideline: Toast dismissal (swipe or timeout) should fade + slide out so it clears predictably
reduced_motion_fallback: instant removal of toast; no exit slide

guideline: Stacked-toast reflow should animate remaining toasts settling up when one is dismissed
reduced_motion_fallback: instant reposition of remaining toasts; no settle

guideline: In-app status dot going online/offline should crossfade color rather than blink to avoid distraction
reduced_motion_fallback: instant color/label change; no crossfade
